step.name: root
step.action: Define WBS root = project name; level-1 children = phases or major deliverables.
step.decision-gate: Reject if level 1 spans scope-baseline exclusions.

step.name: decompose
step.action: For each parent, decompose to deliverables (noun-led). Stop when leaves fit 8-80h.

step.name: 100-percent-check
step.action: At each level, verify children sum to exactly parent scope; no gaps, no overlap.

step.name: dictionary
step.action: Author dictionary entry per leaf: owner, estimate (lo-hi), inputs, outputs, acceptance.

step.name: audit
step.action: Run wbs_lint / wbs-check + cross-check against baseline for gold-plating.
